message:
fix(alloc): reject extents that cross block group boundaries in free_blocks

Add a pre-validation check to both `free_blocks` and `free_blocks_persist`
that verifies `rel_start + count` does not exceed the number of blocks in
the target block group. Without this guard, a corrupt or maliciously
crafted extent could cause the bitmap mutation to write past the end of
the group's block bitmap, silently corrupting the bitmap of an adjacent
group or triggering an out-of-bounds panic.

The check uses `saturating_add` to avoid overflow on pathological inputs
and returns `FfsError::Corruption` with a descriptive detail string so
the caller can surface the issue through the normal error-reporting path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
